summary: Admin Panel CRUD Modal Testing - All modals working correctly. Modal refactoring verified successful.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel modals have been fully refactored to use the new reusable Modal component. All modals (Projects, Brands, Articles) are: (1) properly centered, (2) scrollable for long forms, (3) close via X button and Cancel button, (4) close via backdrop click, (5) close via ESC key, (6) properly populated with existing data when editing.

projects_admin.modal_open: PASS - Add Project modal opens correctly
projects_admin.modal_scrollable: PASS - Long form scrolls within modal
projects_admin.edit_prepopulated: PASS - Edit form populated with existing project data

brands_admin.modal_open: PASS - Add Brand modal opens correctly

articles_admin.modal_open: PASS - Add Article modal opens correctly

data_persistence.notes: All existing data preserved - Projects: 19, Brands: 37, Articles: 53

features: Configurable sizes: sm, md, lg, xl, full

minor_improvements_made: Added data-testid="modal-close-button" to Modal.tsx for better test automation
